headline: IBB ETF Holds Fewer Bets Than You Think
summary: An ETF's label tells you the category, but the real story is always in the portfolio's actual shape.

headline: Vertex to Acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals (CRNX) in $85 Per Share Cash Deal
summary: Crinetics Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:CRNX) is one of the 10 affordable biotech stocks to buy right now. On July 6, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:CRNX) and Vertex Pharmaceuticals announced that both companies have agreed to a definitive agreement, according to which Vertex will acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals. The deal is priced at $85 a share in cash consideration, […]
